links.description: Generic file/document icon — a page shape with folded top-right corner and horizontal lines suggesting text content, rendered in gray (#666). Typical UI asset used to represent files or attachments.

links.label: represents a globe/world icon in gray (#666) with a circular world map design using meridian and latitude lines, 16x16px, suitable for internationalization or link/web indicators in UI

links.note: SVG contains the Next.js wordmark ('Next') rendered in black with the full text including 'JS' suffix letters, used as the official Next.js framework logo

links.label: represents a browser or application window frame with three circular controls (traffic lights) in the top-left, rendered in gray (#666) on a 16x16 viewBox, suitable as a UI icon for windowed application context
